profile.belief: Legibility returns agency to someone whose fear was built on misunderstanding, not actual threat.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep empathy for young patients, seeking to transform fear into understanding, empowering them to reclaim their voices in healthcare decisions.
